opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My hands keep locking up into claws, my lips are completely numb, and I have absolutely no energy left to stand.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's been building for a couple of days and today the cramping and numbness got much worse — I'm frightened and I live on my own.

symptom_narrative.onset: started about 48 hours ago with tingling around my mouth and in my fingers
symptom_narrative.duration: about two days, and much worse today
symptom_narrative.character: tingling and numbness around my lips and fingers that today turned into painful cramps, with my hands seizing up into claw shapes
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: really bad now — the cramps are painful and I can barely stand up
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: around my mouth, my fingers and hands, and my legs feel weak
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it's been coming on steadily and getting worse, with spasms coming in waves
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps getting worse, and I feel dizzy when I stand up
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I've had no energy at all, I feel weak and wiped out, and I get lightheaded standing up
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had tingling before but never this bad and never with my hands cramping like this
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can hardly move around because of the cramps and how exhausted I am

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: thrush in my mouth that keeps coming back — I've had it on and off since I was a kid
white patches on my skin where I've lost colour
past_medical_history.how_managed: nothing much, just told it was harmless

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: some patches of hair loss on my scalp
I've lost some weight recently without trying, and lately I feel the cold more than I used to

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: I live by myself, so there's no one here with me right now if things get worse

objective_data_offered.value: on video my hands keep drawing up and cramping into claw-like shapes on and off
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-observed on chat video; not a clinician examination

objective_data_offered.value: my lips and fingers feel numb and tingly
I feel lightheaded and unsteady when I stand up
